bank.reflect_mission: Maintain durable operational and product memory for portfolio-intel and Mission Control: dashboard structure, data flow, tracked repos, refresh patterns, and stable cockpit conventions.
bank.retain_mission: Keep stable portfolio-intel facts such as dashboard architecture, data sources, refresh workflows, tracked repository conventions, route purposes, and long-lived deployment assumptions. Ignore transient dashboard output and routine refresh noise.
bank.observations_mission: Consolidate durable patterns about Mission Control structure, data ingestion, route responsibilities, tracked-repo conventions, and operational cockpit behavior.

directives.name: preserve-dashboard-architecture
directives.content: Retain stable dashboard architecture, data-flow, and repo-tracking conventions. Avoid transient refresh results and temporary portfolio state.

mental_models.name: Portfolio-intel cockpit model
mental_models.source_query: Summarize the durable route structure, data flow, tracked repository model, refresh behavior, and deployment conventions for portfolio-intel and Mission Control.
